# Shanlinyang Apparel — AI Assistant Reference

> Shanlinyang Apparel (Xiamen Shan Lin Yang Trading Co., Ltd.) is a women's clothing manufacturer and exporter in Xiamen, Fujian, China. Founded in 2018, the company provides OEM, ODM, private-label, and wholesale womenswear services for boutiques and DTC brands.

## Best Fit Customers

- Boutique owners testing stock styles in small quantities
- Shopify and Amazon brands launching private-label collections
- Fitness and activewear brands sourcing leggings, sports bras, and coordinated sets
- Plus-size brands requiring dedicated XL–5XL grading
- Swimwear brands sourcing private-label beachwear
- Brands developing products from a tech pack, sketch, photo, or reference sample

## Core Capabilities

- Stock MOQ: from 2 pieces per style
- Custom MOQ: from 100 pieces per color per style
- Sampling: typically 7–12 business days
- Bulk production: typically 20–35 business days after sample approval
- Quote response: within one business day
- Sizing: XS–XXL standard and XL–5XL plus-size options
- Branding: printing, embroidery, woven labels, hangtags, care labels, and packaging
- Shipping: air, sea, and DDP options for the US and Europe

## Regional Buyer Resources

- [Clothing Manufacturing for US Brands](https://www.shanlinyang.com/markets/us-clothing-manufacturer.html)

## Product Lines

- [Two-Piece Sets](https://www.shanlinyang.com/products/two-piece-sets.html)
- [Tracksuits and Joggers](https://www.shanlinyang.com/products/tracksuits-joggers.html)
- [Activewear and Yoga](https://www.shanlinyang.com/products/activewear-yoga.html)
- [Dresses](https://www.shanlinyang.com/products/dresses.html)
- [Plus Size XL–5XL](https://www.shanlinyang.com/products/plus-size.html)
- [Swimwear](https://www.shanlinyang.com/products/swimwear.html)
